sentenceTimings.text:
About This Story

In this inspiring story, a young teen becomes her family's translator during a medical emergency.
When her sister needs help at the hospital, she must translate between English and Spanish.
She feels scared but steps up when her family needs her most.
This is a powerful message about courage, responsibility, and discovering your own strength.
Medical terms she'd never heard before.
Her mother's eyes, wide with fear, waiting for her to translate.
One wrong word could mean the wrong medicine.
One missed detail could mean her sister wouldn't get the help she needed.
At 14, she had to be perfect.
There was no room for mistakes.
This is the moment she realized: she wasn't just a daughter anymore.
In immigrant families across America, millions of children become "language brokers"—translating for parents who don't speak English.
When medical emergencies happen, these young translators face life-or-death responsibility.
This is the story of one teen who stepped up in a crisis and discovered her own strength.
